headline: Climate Change Solutions
description: Climate change solutions span multiple sectors: Energy (renewable: solar, wind — now cheapest electricity in history), Transportation (EVs, public transit, cycling infrastructure), Food (plant-rich diets, reduced food waste), Buildings (insulation, heat pumps), Land use (reforestation, regenerative agriculture). The technology exists; political will and investment are the bottlenecks.

citation.name: Drawdown: The Most Comprehensive Plan Ever Proposed to Reverse Global Warming (Paul Hawken)
